description: Floki Inu (FLOKI) emerged as a community-driven memecoin inspired by Elon Musk’s Shiba Inu, rising across Web3 through viral culture and massive grassroots adoption. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 FLOKI gives FLOKI holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, full AI contract capability, turning FLOKI into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Floki Inu
